videoSnippet.title: The King of Comebacks || Jan-Krzysztof Duda vs Magnus Carlsen || Chess.com Open 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Duda, Jan-Krzysztof (2845) - Carlsen, Magnus (2923)
2026 Chess.com Open (Chess.com) [04-05] 2026.04.24
D35 Queen's Gambit Declined, exchange, positional line

1.d4 Nf6 2.c4 e6 3.Nc3 d5 4.cxd5 exd5 5.Bg5 Be7 6.e3 O-O 7.Bd3 c6 8.h3 Re8 9.Nge2 a5 10.O-O Nbd7 11.a4 Nh5 12.Bxe7 Qxe7 13.Qd2 g6 14.Rae1 Ndf6 15.Nc1 Ne4 16.Qc2 Nd6 17.Nb3 Qh4 18.Kh2 Nf6 19.Nd2 Bf5 20.Nf3 Bxd3 21.Qxd3 Qh5 22.Ne5 Qf5 23.Qe2 Nd7 24.g4 Qe6 25.f4 f6 26.f5 gxf5 27.gxf5 Qe7 28.Ng4 Kh8 29.Nh6 Nf7 30.Qh5 Nxh6 31.Qxh6 Qd6+ 32.Rf4 Re7 33.Kg2 Rg8+ 34.Rg4 Reg7 35.Qh4 Rg5 36.Rf1 Nb6 37.b3 Qb4 38.Ne2 Qxb3 39.Nf4 Qc2+ 40.Kg3 Qxf5 41.Rf3 Rxg4+ 42.hxg4 Qg5 43.Ne6 Qxh4+ 44.Kxh4 Nd7 45.Kh5 Re8 46.Nf4 Kg7 47.Kh4 Kf7 48.Nh5 Kg6 49.Ng3 Nb6 50.Nf5 Nc4 51.Rh3 h5 52.Rf3 Re4 53.Ng3
